metadata.title: FitMusc — Personal Fitness Tracker
metadata.description: AI-powered personal fitness training and nutrition tracker. Weekly training and nutrition plans, progress tracking, smart suggestions.

manifest.name: FitMusc
manifest.description: Personal fitness training and nutrition tracker
manifest.assistantDescription: Chat with your AI fitness coach

pwa.installDescription: Follow the steps below to add the app to your home screen.
pwa.ios1Prefix: In Safari's bottom menu, tap the
pwa.android1Suffix: icon in the browser's top-right corner
pwa.cardInstalledSubtitle: FitMusc is installed on your device
pwa.cardSubtitle: Add to home screen, get notifications automatically
pwa.fallbackAlert: Use the "Add to Home Screen" option in your browser's menu.

pwa.dialogDescription: Follow the steps below to add the app to your home screen.
pwa.fallbackAlert: Use "Add to Home Screen" from your browser's menu.
pwa.installedBody: FitMusc is installed on your device
pwa.promoTitle: Install the App on Your Device
pwa.promoBody: Add to your home screen — notifications turn on automatically

ios.step1: Tap the Share icon in Safari's bottom menu
ios.step2: Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen
ios.step3: Tap the Add button in the top right

android.step1: Tap the menu icon in the top-right of the browser
android.step2: Tap Add to Home Screen or Install app

desktop.step1: Click the install icon in the address bar
desktop.step2: Or use Install app from the browser's menu

feedback.title: Feedback

notificationPrompt.title: Enable Notifications
notificationPrompt.description: Get notified instantly when your meal times approach, your workout plan is ready, and your reminders trigger. Turn on notifications to stay on track with your program.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Policy
cookieConsent.description: This app uses essential cookies for session management. We'd also like to use analytics cookies to improve your experience.

aiWeekly.title: Weekly Plan with AI
aiWeekly.overlayTitleNutrition: AI is preparing your nutrition plan
aiWeekly.overlayTitleWorkout: AI is preparing your workout plan
aiWeekly.overlayTitleBoth: AI is preparing your weekly plan
aiWeekly.willReplace: This will completely replace your existing weekly program. Previous meals and exercises will be deleted.
aiWeekly.deloadToggleHelp: Volume drops ~50%, intensity is preserved. Calories shift toward maintenance, protein stays the same.
aiWeekly.deloadReasonSleepQuality: Low sleep quality in the last 7 days
aiWeekly.deloadReasonSleepDuration: Average sleep < 6.5 h in the last 7 days
aiWeekly.deloadJustDeloadedNote: Last week was already deload; resume normal training this week.

levelHint.beginnerBody: {days} selected as workout days by default. This split allows recovery between muscle groups; tap any day to change.
levelHint.intermediateBody: {days} selected as workout days by default. Suits an upper/lower split; tap any day to change.
levelHint.advancedBody: {days} selected as workout days by default. Suits a 5-day split; tap any day to change.
levelHint.missingLevel: Your training level isn't set; defaulting to a 5-day split.

aiWeekly.dayTooltipPast: {label}: this day has passed — AI will not suggest content
aiWeekly.dayCycleNote: Cycles: Workout → Swimming → Rest. Nutrition program is written for every day.

settings.onboardingBannerDesc: Your daily routine, health notes, fitness level, and supplement info are used in AI evaluations. The more detail you provide, the more personalized your program.

items.sharingSubtitle: Share your program with other users

locale.label: Language / Dil
locale.description: Choose the language for the app interface.

subpages.sharingSubtitle: Share your program with other users

macros.infoSubtitle: The role of calories, protein, carbs and fat
macros.intro: Macronutrients (macros) are the three core nutrient groups your body uses for energy and building blocks. Finding the right macro balance is the foundation for reaching your goals, sustaining energy, and optimizing your muscle-to-fat ratio.
macros.calorieDesc: Your body's unit of energy. Eat more than you burn and you store fat; eat less and you burn fat.
macros.proteinDesc: The building block of every cell, especially muscle tissue. Critical for recovery, satiety and lean mass.
macros.carbsDesc: The primary fuel for the brain and muscles. Required for training performance and glycogen stores.
macros.fatDesc: Essential for hormone production, fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E, K) and long-term energy.
macros.tipBody: When setting macro targets, make sure they're consistent with your goal (fat loss, muscle gain, maintenance). The AI calculator below optimizes for you based on your profile and measurement data.

reminderDialog.intervalHint: This reminder repeats automatically every day between the chosen hours.

notificationPrefs.title: Notification Preferences
notificationPrefs.pushUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
notificationPrefs.pushBlocked: Push notifications were blocked in browser settings. Allow them in browser settings.
notificationPrefs.quietHoursHint: During these hours push and email notifications are not sent. In-app notifications are still recorded.

first-day.title: First Step
first-day.description: You completed your very first day!

streak-3.title: 3-Day Streak
streak-3.description: You completed the plan 3 days in a row.

streak-7.title: Weekly Warrior
streak-7.description: You didn't miss a single day for a full week!

streak-14.title: 2-Week Resolve
streak-14.description: 14 days in a row — incredible discipline!

streak-30.title: 30-Day Legend
streak-30.description: A full month every day. Legendary!

streak-60.title: 60-Day Titan
streak-60.description: Two months without quitting. You're a titan!

days-100.title: Hundredth Day
days-100.description: 100 full days. It's a lifestyle now!

friend.title: Friend Streaks
friend.catchUp: Start today to catch up with your friends!

recommendation.low: Consider rest or very light activity — don't push today.
recommendation.moderate: Drop the volume or focus on technique. Today isn't a max-effort day.
recommendation.good: Run the plan as scheduled. It's a good day.
recommendation.excellent: Cleared for hard work. Push your goals today.

form.title: How are you feeling today?
form.subtitle: Takes 5 seconds. You can update it any time.

reminder.title: Log Today's Readiness
reminder.body: How are you feeling today? 5 seconds of input improves your plan.

form.presetHint: Values are averages; adjust per your product label.
form.frequencyHint: Pick active days; selecting all means every day.

welcome.title: Welcome to FitMusc!
welcome.description: Your personal fitness and nutrition assistant. Track your training program, plan your nutrition, and see your progress.

weekly.title: Weekly Plan
weekly.description: Build a weekly training and nutrition plan with AI. Get a fresh, personalized program every week.

daily.title: Daily Tracking
daily.description: Check off meals and exercises as you complete them. See your daily progress instantly.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: Ask your fitness coach anything. Get nutrition tips, exercise alternatives, and motivation.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.description: Track your evolution with weight, measurements, and charts. Use AI analysis to evaluate your progress.

gender.title: Biological sex
gender.intro: We ask for your biological sex so we can compute calorie and macro targets accurately. This info is not shown on your profile.

activity.title: Daily activity level
activity.intro: On a typical day, how active are you OUTSIDE of training?

flags.title: Health safety
flags.intro: Do any of the following apply to you? We use this info only to keep your program SAFE; it is protected as special-category health data under privacy regulations.

hasEatingDisorderHistory.label: I have a history of eating disorders (anorexia, bulimia, orthorexia)
hasEatingDisorderHistory.rationale: Intermittent fasting is not recommended; calorie tracking is kept gentle

isPregnantOrBreastfeeding.label: I am pregnant or breastfeeding
isPregnantOrBreastfeeding.rationale: Calorie deficits are not recommended; IF is never applied

hasDiabetes.label: I have diabetes (Type 1 or insulin-treated Type 2)
hasDiabetes.rationale: Insulin-compatible meal timing; IF is never applied

hasThyroidCondition.label: I have an untreated thyroid condition
hasThyroidCondition.rationale: More conservative calorie targets; cortisol protection

setupBanner.title: Your profile is ready! 🎉
setupBanner.description: You can now build your weekly training and nutrition program.

hero.headline2: On the Way to Your Goal
hero.subhead: FitMusc is your personal fitness coach powered by the world's most capable AI models. Nutrition planning, workout tracking, and progress analysis — all in one place.

mock.aiBubble: You're at 94% of your protein goal — great pace! 💪

features.heading: Everything You Need, In One Place
features.subhead: Smart tools for every step of your fitness journey.

ai.title: AI Fitness Coach
ai.desc: Your personal trainer powered by Claude 4, available 24/7. Expert guidance on everything from exercise form to nutrition plans.

nutrition.title: Smart Nutrition Tracking
nutrition.desc: Personalized macro targets, meal planning, and automatic shopping lists. Eating well has never been this easy.

progress.title: Progress Analysis
progress.desc: Visualize weight, body measurements, and performance data. AI-powered trend analysis keeps you on track toward your goals.

weekly.title: Weekly Program
weekly.desc: View your workout and nutrition plans on a single calendar. Drill into the day, personalize the plan, share with your coach.

streak.title: Streaks & Achievements
streak.desc: Track daily activity streaks and earn badges. The gamification system keeps you motivated every day.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.desc: Personalized notifications for water, meal times, and workouts. Never miss a thing.

aiSpotlight.bodyA: Powered by Anthropic's Claude models, FitMusc doesn't just inform —
aiSpotlight.bodyB: . It tracks your macro budget in real time, suggests meals based on remaining goals, and analyzes your exercise form.
bullets: Exercise form tips and technique analysis
aiSpotlight.userMsg1: What's the best meal for an evening workout?
aiSpotlight.aiMsg1A: Based on your macro status today,
aiSpotlight.aiMsg1B: before training I'd recommend complex carbs + moderate protein. You have 62g of protein left — perfect time to complete it.
aiSpotlight.userMsg2: Should I do Pilates or HIIT?
aiSpotlight.aiMsg2A: Given your 12-day streak and this week's load analysis,
aiSpotlight.aiMsg2B: is the better fit. Preserving recovery quality matters far more long-term.

progress.body: See your progress from every angle with weight charts, body measurements, 7-day macro trends, and activity streaks. AI analyzes your trends and tells you what you're doing well and what to improve.
bullets: Body measurement tracking — waist, hips, shoulder, and more

gamification.heading: Stronger Every Day
gamification.subhead: Streak tracking and achievement badges keep you tied to your goals. When motivation runs out, your system kicks in.

wellness.heading: All Dimensions of Your Health
wellness.subhead: Not just workouts — a holistic approach to life.

invite.title: Get an Invite
invite.desc: FitMusc is invite-only. Wait for an invitation from your trainer or our team.

profile.title: Build Your Profile
profile.desc: Enter your height, weight, goals, and health info. AI personalization kicks in immediately.

go.title: Run Toward Your Goal
go.desc: With a daily plan, an AI coach, and progress tracking, results become inevitable.

miniFeatures.heading: And So Much More
miniFeatures.subhead: Every feature you can think of is already here.
items: PWA — install like a mobile app

testimonial.quote: FitMusc made it so easy to follow my training program and stick to my nutrition plan. The AI coach feature really makes a difference — like having an expert by my side at all times.
testimonial.author: Ahmet Y.

finalCta.heading: Transformation Starts Now
finalCta.body: Your invite is ready. Sign in to FitMusc and start your fitness journey today.

sharing.title: Shared Plans
sharing.subtitle: Programs shared with you
sharing.empty: No plans have been shared with you yet
